1100.full_name: Qays bin Abi Ka'b b. al-Qayn b. Ka'b b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1100.arabic: قيس بن أبي كعب بن الفين الأنصاري
1100.father_name: Abi Ka'b b. al-Qayn b. Ka'b b. Sawad
1100.siblings: Malik bin Abi Ka'b b. al-Qayn

1101.full_name: Mu'adh bin al-Harith bin Suraqa b. Khannas b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b
1101.arabic: معاذ بن الحارث بن سراقة الأنصاري السلمي

1102.short_name: Khadij bin Salama bin Aus bin 'Amr
1102.full_name: Khadij bin Salama bin Aus bin 'Amr bin Ka'b bin al-Furafir, an aly of B.Haram from Baliy
1102.bio: Her wife was one of the two women present at the second Aqaba pledge. She delivered his son on the same night.

1103.short_name: Shibath bin Khadij bin Salama bin Aus
1103.full_name: Shibath bin Khadij bin Salama bin Aus bin 'Amr bin Ka'b bin al-Furafir, an aly of B.Haram from Baliy
1103.arabic: شباث بن خديج بن سلامة بن أوس
1103.bio: His mother was one of the two women present at the second Aqaba pledge. He was born on the same night.

1105.full_name: Hammam bin al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1105.arabic: حمام بن الجموح بن زيد الأنصاري

1106.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin 'Amr bin al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1106.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن عمرو بن الجموح الأنصاري

1107.full_name: 'Uthman bin 'Amr bin al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1107.arabic: عثمان بن عمرو بن الجموح الأنصاري السلمي

1108.full_name: Mukhalad bin 'Amr bin al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1108.arabic: مخلد بن عمرو بن الجموح الأنصاري السلمي

1109.full_name: Mu'adh bin al-Simma bin 'Amr bin al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1109.arabic: معاذ بن الصمة بن عمرو بن الجموح الأنصاري
1109.mother_name: Umm Habib bint 'Abdur Rahman from Ta'if
1109.bio: According to some sources, he was at Badr.

1110.full_name: 'Amr bin al-Humam bin al-Jamuh bin Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1110.arabic: عمرو بن الحمام بن الجموح الأنصاري

1111.full_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Atik bin Qays bin al-Aswad b. Murry b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1111.arabic: عبد الله بن عتيك بن قيس بن الأسود
1111.bio: There is some confusion about this companion as there exist another companion with similar name from Aus.

1112.full_name: Jabir bin 'Atik bin Qays bin al-Aswad b. Murry b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1112.arabic: جابر بن عتيك بن قيس بن الأسود
1112.bio: There is some confusion about this companion as there exist another companion with similar name from Aus.

1113.full_name: Khishrim bin al-Hubbab b. al-Mundhir b. al-Jumah b. Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b

1114.full_name: Mubushir bin  al-Bara' bin Ma'rur b. Shakr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b
1114.arabic: مبشر بن البراء بن معرور الأنصاري

1115.full_name: Khallad bin Qays bin al-Nu'man b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1115.arabic: خلاد بن قيس بن النعمان بن سنان
1115.mother_name: Adam bint al-Qayn of B. Salima
1115.bio: According to some sources, he participated in the battle of Badr.

1116.full_name: Mas'ud bin Zayd(Yazid) bin Subay' b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1116.arabic: مسعود بن زيد بن سبيع الأنصاري

1117.full_name: 'Amir bin Nabi b. Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1118.full_name: 'Umair bin 'Amir bin Nabi b. Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1119.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Khirash bin al-Simma b. 'Amr b. al-Jamuh b. Zayd b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b
1119.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن خراش بن الصمة الأنصاري

1120.full_name: Tha'laba(al-Jidha') bin Zayd b. Harith b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1120.bio: According to some sources, He was present at Badr with his son.
1120.spouses: Umm Annas bint S'ad of B.Qadha'a

1121.full_name: Mirdas bin Marwan b. al-Jidha' bin Zayd b. Harith b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1122.full_name: Marwan b. al-Jidha'(Tha'laba) bin Zayd b. Harith b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima

1123.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Yazid bin 'Amir bin Hadida b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1123.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن يزيد بن عامر بن حديدة

1124.full_name: al-Mundhir bin Yazid bin 'Amir bin Hadida b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1124.arabic: المنذر بن يزيد بن عامر بن حديدة

1125.full_name: 'Umair bin K'ab bin 'Amr bin 'Ubbad b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1125.arabic: عمير بن أبي اليسر بن عمرو بن عباد

1126.full_name: Yazid bin K'ab bin 'Amr bin 'Ubbad b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1126.arabic: يزيد بن أبي اليسر بن عمرو بن عباد
1126.spouses: 1287,Umm Walad,Fatima bint Abi Salma of B.'Ady b. al-Najjar

1127.full_name: Habib bin K'ab bin 'Amr bin 'Ubbad b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1127.arabic: حبيب بن أبي اليسر بن عمرو الأنصاري

1128.short_name: Muhammad bin al-Jadd bin Qays bin Sakhr
1128.full_name: Muhammad bin al-Jadd bin Qays bin Sakhr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b
1128.arabic: محمد بن الجد بن قيس الأنصاري السلمي
1128.bio: He is brother of Mu'adh bin Jabal from mother side. His father was considered, by some scholars, as one of the Hypocrite.

1129.full_name: al-Jadd bin Qays bin Sakhr b. Khansa b. Sinan b. 'Ubaid b. 'Adi b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1129.bio: He was the leader of Banu Salima. He was considered, by some scholars, as one of the Hypocrite.

1131.short_name: 'Abdullah bin Ka'b bin Malik b. Abi Ka'b
1131.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Ka'b bin Malik bin Abi Ka'b b. al-Qayn b. Ka'b b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1131.arabic: عبد الله بن كعب بن مالك السلمي الأنصاري
1131.bio: He is considered as a Tabi'.

1132.full_name: 'Ubaydullah bin Ka'b bin Malik bin Abi Ka'b b. al-Qayn b. Ka'b b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1132.arabic: عبيد الله بن كعب بن مالك السلمي الأنصاري
1132.bio: He is considered as a Tabi'.
1132.spouses: 1052,Umm Sa'id bint 'Abdullah bin 'Unays,Sahla bint al-Nu'man bin Jubayr

1133.full_name: Ma'bad bin Ka'b bin Malik bin Abi Ka'b b. al-Qayn b. Ka'b b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1133.arabic: معبد بن كعب بن مالك السلمي الأنصاري
1133.bio: He is considered as a Tabi'

1134.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Ka'b bin Malik bin Abi Ka'b b. al-Qayn b. Ka'b b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1134.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن كعب بن مالك السلمي

1135.full_name: Yahya bin 'Umair bin al-Harith (b. Labda) b. Tha'laba b. al-Harith b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b

1136.short_name: Sahl bin Malik bin Abi Ka'b
1136.full_name: Sahl bin Malik bin Abi Ka'b b. al-Qayn b. Ka'b b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1136.arabic: سهل بن مالك بن أبي كعب بن القين الأنصاري
1136.father_name: Malik bin Abi Ka'b b. al-Qayn

1137.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Malik bin Abi Ka'b b. al-Qayn b. Ka'b b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1137.arabic: عبد الله بن مالك بن أبي كعب بن القين
1137.father_name: Malik bin Abi Ka'b b. al-Qayn

1149.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin  Mu'adh ibn Jabal ibn 'Amr b. Aus b. 'Aidh b. 'Adi b. Ka'b b. 'Amr b. Ady b. Sa'd
1149.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن معاذ بن جبل الأنصاري

1150.full_name: al-sa'ba bint Jabal bin 'Amr b. Aus b. 'Aidh b. 'Adi b. Ka'b b. 'Amr b. Ady b. Sa'd
1150.arabic: الصعبة بنت جبل بن عمرو بن أوس

1151.full_name: Umm 'Abdullah bint Mu'adh ibn Jabal ibn 'Amr b. Aus b. 'Aidh b. 'Adi b. Ka'b b. 'Amr b. Ady b. Sa'd
1151.arabic: أم عبد الله بنت معاذ بن جبل بن عمرو
1151.mother_name: Umm 'Amr bint Khalid b. 'Amr of B.Sawad B.Salima

1152.arabic: أم عبد الله بنت عبد الله بن أنيس

1153.full_name: Umm 'Abdur Rahman, wife of Ka'b bin Malik (Umm Walad)

1154.full_name: Khayra, wife of Ka'b bin Malik
1154.arabic: خيرة امرأة كعب بن مالك الأنصاري

1155.full_name: Kabsha bint Ka'b bin Malik bin Abi Ka'b b. al-Qayn b. Ka'b b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1155.arabic: كبشة بنت كعب بن مالك الأنصارية

1157.arabic: فاضلة امرأة عبد الله بن أنيس

1159.full_name: Sukhta bint Aswad bin 'Ubbad b. 'Amr b. Sawad b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1159.mother_name: Hamima bint 'Ubaid bin Abi Ka'b of B. Salima

1190.short_name: Umm Tha'laba bint b. Zayd b. al-Harith
1190.full_name: Umm Tha'laba bint b. Zayd b. al-Harith b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b b. Salima
1190.arabic: أم ثعلبة بنت زيد بن الحارث بن حرام

1191.short_name: Umm Iyas bint Thabit bin al-Jidha'(*)
1191.full_name: Umm Iyas/Umm al-Harith bint Thabit bin al-Jidha' b. Zayd b. Harith b. Haram b. Ka'b b. Ghanm b. Ka'b
1191.arabic: أم الحارث / أم إياس بنت ثابت بن الجذع
